'''鈭歵h-ng-d-w''' ('''kathangdewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:alter|alter]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-ng-d-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:alter|alter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歵h-ng-d-w
|-
! Lemma
| kathangdewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithangdewoko|thithangdewoko]] || [[word:jithangdewoko|jithangdewoko]] || [[word:shithangdewoko|shithangdewoko]] || [[word:kithangdewoko|kithangdewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthangdewoko|thuthuthangdewoko]] || [[word:jujuthangdewoko|jujuthangdewoko]] || [[word:shushuthangdewoko|shushuthangdewoko]] || [[word:kukuthangdewoko|kukuthangdewoko]]
|-

|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthangdewoko|thuthangdewoko]] || [[word:juthangdewoko|juthangdewoko]] || [[word:shuthangdewoko|shuthangdewoko]] || [[word:kuthangdewoko|kuthangdewoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothangdewoko|thothangdewoko]] || [[word:jothangdewoko|jothangdewoko]] || [[word:shothangdewoko|shothangdewoko]] || [[word:kothangdewoko|kothangdewoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothangdewoko|thothangdewoko]] || [[word:jothangdewoko|jothangdewoko]] || [[word:shothangdewoko|shothangdewoko]] || [[word:kothangdewoko|kothangdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙thangdewoko|th忙thangdewoko]] || [[word:j忙thangdewoko|j忙thangdewoko]] || [[word:sh忙thangdewoko|sh忙thangdewoko]] || [[word:k忙thangdewoko|k忙thangdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathangdewoko|thathathangdewoko]] || [[word:jajathangdewoko|jajathangdewoko]] || [[word:shashathangdewoko|shashathangdewoko]] || [[word:kakathangdewoko|kakathangdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathangdewoko|thathangdewoko]] || [[word:jathangdewoko|jathangdewoko]] || [[word:shathangdewoko|shathangdewoko]] || [[word:kathangdewoko|kathangdewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathangdewoko|thathangdewoko]] || [[word:jathangdewoko|jathangdewoko]] || [[word:shathangdewoko|shathangdewoko]] || [[word:kathangdewoko|kathangdewoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
